## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Validation | Poker Domain Meaning |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
{{FIELD_ROWS}}

<!--
BaseModel row format:
| `game_state` | GameState | Yes | — | must be valid GameState enum value | Current betting street (flop/turn/river) on which this hand was recorded |
| `community_cards` | List[str] | No | [] | each element must be a valid card string | The board cards visible at the time of recording — subset of the 5 community cards |

Enum row format (replace the table above with this one for Enum types):

| Member | Value | Poker Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `FLOP` | `"flop"` | The first 3 community cards have been dealt; first post-flop betting round |
| `TURN` | `"turn"` | The 4th community card has been dealt; second post-flop betting round |
| `RIVER` | `"river"` | The 5th and final community card has been dealt; last betting round before showdown |
| `BAD_GAME_STATE` | `"bad_game_state"` | Sentinel value for invalid or unrecognized state transitions — not a real poker term |
-->

## Validators

{{VALIDATORS}}

<!--
Document each @field_validator and @model_validator:

**`validate_card_string()` — `@field_validator("hole_cards", "community_cards", mode="before")`**
Verifies each card string in the list matches the pattern `[A2-9TJQK][SHDC]` (case-insensitive). Raises `ValueError` with message "Invalid card: {card}" on first invalid entry. Applied before type coercion.

Or: "None defined."
-->
